description: Take running to the next level with these Equale shoes from adidas. These comfortable trainers are engineered with superior cushioning with better shock absorption properties. Team them up with jeans and tees for a cool casual look. Upper Nubuck and suede leather upper with overlays for better durabilty and structure Perforations on the forefoot and mesh on the mouth for breathability and comfort Lace-ups for better Fit Iconic three stripes symbolising the challenges that are seen ahead and goals that can be achieved on the sides Padded and meshed collar and tongue and textile shoe lining for better comfort Branding at the back of the collar Pull loop Upper adhered to the outsole Outsole Textured outsole with horizontal lugs Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
